commit.message:
ci: add libxi-dev to Linux deps; make release job resilient to partial failures

rdev's x11 crate with xinput feature requires libXi (libxi-dev), which was
missing from the CI apt-get install list — causing every Linux build to fail.

Also update the release job so it runs when at least one platform succeeds,
and skip individual artifact downloads if that platform's build failed.

commit.message:
Android audit: write type detection, heartbeat disconnect, cleanup

CRITICAL: Detect writeWithoutResponse during GATT discovery and use correct
BLE write method — many cheap ELM327 adapters only support write-without-response,
causing silent failures with write-with-response.

Also: null guard on BLE notifications, heartbeat disconnect after 3 consecutive
poll failures, localStorage save warning, duplicate DTC cleanup, dead export removal.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: ensure FusionRing canvas initializes when animated and add dark container for theme contrast

Bug 1: configureCanvas() was only called inside renderStatic(), so animated
mode never set up the 2D context — canvas stayed blank on first load.
Now called at all three entry points (mount, signal-change, resize).

Bug 2: Ring was invisible on light Morning theme due to low contrast.
Wrapped in dark radial-gradient container with gold border.

commit.message:
refactor: batch OCR processing with cross-page dedup and single DB transaction

Instead of spawning one background task per uploaded page (causing SQLite
lock contention with 40 concurrent writers), the batch now runs as a
single background job: OCR pages in parallel (ThreadPool, no DB), dedupe
words across all pages, then import in one DB transaction with retry.

commit.message:
feat: smart model selection + context learning

Smart Model:
- Auto-detects issue complexity (simple/complex) using quick Sonnet call
- Simple issues → Sonnet (fast), complex → Opus (best quality)
- Configurable model mapping in .issue2claude.yml

Context Learning:
- After each successful PR, extracts codebase patterns via Sonnet
- Saves to .issue2claude-context.md in the repo
- Read by Claude on every future run — gets smarter over time
- Learns tech stack, conventions, file structure, naming patterns

commit.message:
simplify rebuild.sh: always npm install, use npx tsc

The previous version used md5/md5sum for lockfile change detection,
which broke on stripped PATH environments. This version always runs
`npm install --ignore-scripts` (fast no-op when deps are current)
and uses `npx tsc` to avoid PATH issues.

commit.message:
chore(web): add vitest config with @/ path alias resolution (#234) (#263)

Add vitest.config.ts that maps the @/ alias to src/, matching the
tsconfig.json paths configuration. This allows tests to import from
any module using @/lib/... style imports instead of relative paths.

Includes a regression test that imports via @/ to verify the alias
works correctly.

Closes #234

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(dx): add --script flag to ecs-run.sh for transferring local scripts (#251) (#264)

Add a --script option that base64-encodes a local file, transfers it to
the ECS container, and executes it with the appropriate interpreter
(python3 for .py files, bash otherwise). Arguments after -- are passed
through to the script.

This solves two problems:
1. The container image doesn't include scripts/ so local scripts can't
   be referenced by path
2. The old cmd="$*" approach loses quoting structure for compound
   commands like bash -c "cmd1 && cmd2"

commit.message:
fix: replace async cookie pattern with sync createServerClient

Root cause: lib/supabase/server.ts used `await cookies()` and wrapped
setAll in try/catch — in Next.js 16 Route Handlers this caused the
session cookie to be silently dropped, producing "Auth session missing!"

Changes:
- lib/supabase/server.ts: createClient() is now synchronous, uses
  cookies() without await, setAll without try/catch (safe in Route Handlers)
- Remove all `await createClient()` calls — not needed now that the
  function is synchronous (await on non-Promise is a no-op)
- Affected: lib/context.ts, lib/getCompanyContext.ts,
  auth/callback, analyze, analyze-competitor, analyze-opportunity,
  analyze-trend, score-lead, weekly-report

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add cookie consent banner to fix Safari ITP storage eviction

User click on parent page makes Safari classify app.digilab.cards as
interactive, preventing storage eviction on browser close. Also
future-proofs for EU scenes (GDPR cookie consent).

commit.message:
Fix Retrace recursion bug in estimate_q_values

Two bugs in the backward recursion:
1. target_q_a used target_q_values[:-1] (current-state Q) instead of [1:]
   (next-state Q), mismatching rlax.general_off_policy_returns_from_q_and_v
2. Recursion used c_t[t] (current trace coeff) instead of c_t[t+1] (next)

These produced fundamentally different Q-targets from the JAX reference.
Updated notebook Cell 4 to compare directly against rlax for verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add spaceship flight controls, HUD, minimap, and nebula effects

Replace orbit camera with WASD + mouse-look spaceship controls using
pointer lock. Add flight HUD (speed bar, compass, nearby planets list),
2D canvas minimap, and proximity-based planet approach labels. Convert
Menu into a toggleable terminal overlay (backtick/ESC) and simplify
Layout to fullscreen canvas. Add nebula cloud shader effects around
planet clusters and speed-reactive chromatic aberration. Use content-
based hashing for deterministic planet appearance. Include browser
test checklist for manual Playwright verification.

commit.message:
Fix 28 audit issues, add PvP turn timer system, server-side result recording

Critical fixes:
- C1: Remove hardcoded Supabase credentials (use env vars)
- C2: Server-side trigger for PvP game results (replaces client-side)
- C3: Upsert player stats to prevent duplicate key errors
- C5: Set search_path on SECURITY DEFINER functions

Warning fixes:
- W1: Lobby filters by league_id in league context
- W2: Use aggregated count query for league member counts
- W3: Include ELO deltas in match records
- W4: Add missing deps to AI game useEffects
- W5: Use refs to avoid stale closures in timer intervals
- W6: Remove unused react-router-dom dependency
- W7: Path-scoped avatar upload storage policy
- W8: Password minimum length validation on signup
- W9: Copy board arrays properly to prevent mutation
- W10: Drop duplicate indexes

Minor fixes:
- M1: Tag preview clarification in signup form
- M2: Compute publicLeagues once and reuse
- M3: Use ref for WinProbabilityBar animation start value
- M4: Remove hardcoded player names
- M5: Parallelize Arena live count queries
- M8: Wrap Profile fetch functions in useCallback
- M10: Parse numeric input properly
- M11: Remove unused function parameter
- M12: Add error handling to ownership transfer
- M13: Fix CSS nth-child selectors for ai-thinking dots

New features:
- Configurable PvP turn timer (opt-in per league)
- League managers can enable/disable timer and set seconds (10-120)
- Timer flows from league settings to game creation to live display

commit.message:
CEO Email OS: digest windows, sender cache, social noise filters, bullet summaries

Pipeline overhaul:
- Replace polling with 3× daily digest windows (07:55, 12:55, 16:55 ET)
- Skip already-GGTC-labeled emails to avoid double-processing
- Sender cache auto-archives repeat spammers after 3 archive classifications
- Body trimmed to 1500 chars before Claude call (token savings)
- Each email posts as its own Slack message (approving one no longer wipes others)
- Draft preview increased to 2900 chars (full visibility before approving)

Classifier refinements:
- Stop drafting replies — generate 1-2 line bullet summaries instead
- Pre-classification fast-path: stale detection → VIP → social noise → Claude
- VIP check now runs before social noise (curated senders always win)
- Social noise: TikTok, LinkedIn, Google reviews, newsletter/digest senders, promo subjects
- Stale patterns: expired links, no longer available requests
- Add ITB category (forward to Nicolle + Christine)
- VIP senders now get GGTC/Read Later label (not Archive)
- Add Benjamin Moore to VIP reading list

Tests: 193 passing (up from 172)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix broken arrow function parameters causing 'u is not defined' ReferenceError

A bad find-and-replace renamed arrow function parameters to $1 but left
the body referencing original variable names (a, c, p, u, e, s, n, etc.),
causing runtime crashes on admin login in production.

Fixed ~95 occurrences across 5 files:
- src/pages/Admin.tsx
- src/components/admin/ClientsTab.tsx
- src/components/admin/ExpensesTab.tsx
- src/components/admin/PipelineTab.tsx
- src/components/admin/TaxesTab.tsx

commit.message:
Replace Ollama HTTP API with mistral.rs inference abstraction

Introduce LlmBackend/EmbeddingBackend traits backed by mistral.rs for
direct GPU model loading, eliminating the Ollama HTTP dependency.
Refactor ConceptsModel and EmbeddingModel to use trait objects with
mock backends for unit testing. Update Dockerfile to CUDA base image
with configurable compute capability. Add comprehensive tests for
concept extraction, embedding generation, and error propagation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add full QA validation: 21-error pipeline in Survey123 + backend

Survey123 XLSForm (Farq_pilot_2-2-26.xlsx):
- Name_AR: Arabic-only, no category-only words
- Name_EN: English-only, no category-only words
- Phone: Saudi format validation (+9665/05/800/900/920)
- Email: valid format constraint
- Website: blocks Google Maps URLs
- Social Media: blocks WhatsApp/phone numbers
- Building: 4-digit constraint
- Coordinates: Riyadh bounds (24-25.5, 46-47.5)
- Commercial License: 10-11 digits
- Video: mp4/mov/youtube only
- Category-based relevance: F&B/Mosque/Attraction fields
- 14 mandatory fields, 13 constrained fields

Backend POST /api/validate-poi:
- Full 21-error QA pipeline
- Returns corrected POI + qa_report (blockers/warnings/changes)
- UNAVAILABLE vs UNAPPLICABLE logic
- Duplicate media URL detection
- Category-keyword mismatch detection
- Boolean field normalization by category
